title: China-Italy Double Tax Treaty 2026: FAQs for Italian Investors - China Briefing
summary: China-Italy Double Tax Treaty 2026: FAQs for Italian Investors China Briefing
ai_summary: This item provides FAQs regarding the new China-Italy Double Tax Treaty (DTT) for 2026, offering crucial guidance for Italian investors operating in China. The DTT aims to clarify taxing rights, reduce withholding taxes, and enhance bilateral trade and investment by establishing a more predictable tax environment between the two nations.

title: Parliament ratifies double taxation avoidance agreement with Japan - AKIpress News Agency
summary: Parliament ratifies double taxation avoidance agreement with Japan AKIpress News Agency
ai_summary: A national parliament has ratified a Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) with Japan, marking a significant step towards its entry into force. This DTAA aims to prevent double taxation, foster economic cooperation, and reduce tax barriers on cross-border income flows between the signatory nation and Japan.

title: Ukraine and Germany have signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation - Odessa Journal
summary: Ukraine and Germany have signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation Odessa Journal
ai_summary: Ukraine and Germany have officially signed a new agreement on the avoidance of double taxation, signifying an important development in their bilateral economic relations. This new DTA is expected to streamline tax treatment for cross-border investments and transactions, providing greater certainty for businesses and individuals operating between the two countries.

title: California advances game preservation bill as digital tax debate grows - MSN
summary: California advances game preservation bill as digital tax debate grows MSN
ai_summary: California is progressing with a game preservation bill amid an intensifying debate on digital taxation at the state level. This discussion explores potential new tax structures for digital goods and services, which could impact the digital economy and set precedents for other U.S. states considering similar measures.

title: Nigerian Govt Launches Free Digital Tax Dispute Platforms to Support Businesses and Taxpayers - MSME Africa
summary: Nigerian Govt Launches Free Digital Tax Dispute Platforms to Support Businesses and Taxpayers MSME Africa
ai_summary: The Nigerian government has introduced free digital platforms dedicated to resolving tax disputes for businesses and taxpayers. This initiative aims to enhance the accessibility and efficiency of tax dispute resolution processes, potentially benefitting foreign investors and local enterprises operating in Nigeria.
